name: Sadza
football_benefit: Slow-release energy — ideal 3 hours before a match.
football_benefit_shona: Simba rekugara — idai maawa matatu usati watamba.

name: Rice (cooked)
football_benefit: Easy-to-digest carbs — good for a pre-training meal.
football_benefit_shona: Chikafu chakanaka musati madzidza — rinogadzira simba nekukurumidza.

name: Bread (white)
football_benefit: Quick energy source — great post-match with eggs for recovery.
football_benefit_shona: Simba nekukurumidza — rinoshanda zvakanaka mushure memutambo nemazai.

name: Sweet Potato (Mbambaira)
football_benefit: Nutrient-dense slow carbs with Vitamin A — great match-day fuel.
football_benefit_shona: Chakudya chakazara simba — chinoshanda chakanaka zuva remutambo.

name: Maputi (Popcorn)
football_benefit: Lightweight pre-training snack — eat 1 hour before training.
football_benefit_shona: Chakudya chiduku musati madzidza — idai awa rimwe usati wavamba.

name: Beef (Nyama)
football_benefit: High protein for muscle repair — ideal within 2 hours after a match.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yakawanda yekuvandudza musana — inoshanda mushure memutambo.

name: Chicken
football_benefit: Lean protein — the best match-day meal paired with sadza and vegetables.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yakanaka — chikafu chakanaka zuva remutambo nesadza nemiriwo.

name: Goat Meat
football_benefit: Lean and iron-rich — supports stamina and oxygen delivery during play.
football_benefit_shona: Nyama yakaonda neyakazara simba — inobatsira kukasira nesimba reMO2.

name: Matemba (Dried Fish)
football_benefit: Ultra-high protein at low cost — excellent recovery food after hard training.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yakawanda uye yakachipa — yakanaka zvikuru mushure mekudzidzira nesimba.

name: Eggs
football_benefit: Complete protein with all amino acids — perfect post-match recovery food.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yakazara — inobatsira muviri wako kupora mushure memutambo.

name: Beans (Nyemba)
football_benefit: Plant protein and slow carbs together — cheap and powerful for rest days.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yemiriwo nesimba rechiduku — chakachipa uye chinoshanda mazuva ekuzorora.

name: Groundnuts (Nzungu)
football_benefit: Energy-dense with healthy fats — a small handful is a great training snack.
football_benefit_shona: Chakudya chakazara simba — mutsara muduku wakanaka musati madzidza.

name: Covo / Muriwo
football_benefit: Iron and calcium for strong bones and blood — eat daily for best results.
football_benefit_shona: Simba remapfupa neropa — idai zuva nezuva kuti uwane mhedzisiro yakanaka.

name: Rape (Collard Greens)
football_benefit: Rich in Vitamin K and calcium — supports bone health for tackles and jumps.
football_benefit_shona: Vitamin K necalcium — inobatsira mapfupa kuchiridzika uye kukwirira.

name: Tsunga (Wild Spinach)
football_benefit: Iron-rich leafy green — fights fatigue and keeps energy levels high during 90 minutes.
football_benefit_shona: Yakakwira iron — inorwisa kunonoka uye inochengeta simba nguva yose yemutambo.

name: Pumpkin (Nhopi)
football_benefit: Vitamin A for eye health and immunity — great on rest days.
football_benefit_shona: Vitamin A yemeso uye hutano — yakanaka mazuva ekuzorora.

name: Tomato
football_benefit: Antioxidants to reduce muscle inflammation after hard sessions.
football_benefit_shona: Inodzivirira mutsindo wemishipa mushure mekudzidzira nesimba.

name: Onion
football_benefit: Anti-inflammatory — helps your muscles recover faster.
football_benefit_shona: Inorwisa mutsindo — inobatsira mishipa yako kupora nekukurumidza.

name: Banana
football_benefit: Fast energy and potassium — the #1 pre-training snack. Eat 45 minutes before.
football_benefit_shona: Simba nekukurumidza — chikafu chekutanga musati madzidza. Idai mamineti 45 usati wavamba.

name: Mango (Mangai)
football_benefit: Natural sugars and Vitamin C — helps immunity and provides match-day energy.
football_benefit_shona: Shuga yechisikigo neVitamin C — inobatsira hutano nekupa simba zuva remutambo.

name: Orange
football_benefit: Vitamin C boosts iron absorption — great with matemba or nyemba meals.
football_benefit_shona: Vitamin C inobatsira kutora iron — inoshanda zvakanaka nemaTemba kana nyemba.

name: Guava (Gwava)
football_benefit: Highest Vitamin C of any local fruit — fights fatigue and strengthens immunity.
football_benefit_shona: Vitamin C yakakura pane zvimwe — inorwisa kunonoka uye inochengeta hutano.

name: Watermelon
football_benefit: 92% water — one of the best natural hydration foods on match day.
football_benefit_shona: 92% mvura — imwe yezvikafu zvekumwa zvakanaka zuva remutambo.

name: Maheu
football_benefit: Traditional energy drink with carbs and probiotics — use as a match-day fuel before kick-off.
football_benefit_shona: Doro rekare rezvikafu nesimba — ishandisai zuva remutambo musati matanga.

name: Milk
football_benefit: Protein and calcium for muscle repair — excellent recovery drink within 30 min after training.
football_benefit_shona: Protein necalcium — inobatsira mishipa yako mamineti 30 mushure mekudzidzira.

name: Water
football_benefit: The most important nutrient — drink 500ml before training, sip every 15 min during play.
football_benefit_shona: Chikafu chakakosha kupfuura zvose — nwa 500ml musati madzidza, nwisai mamineti 15 nde15 muri kutamba.

name: Roasted Groundnuts
football_benefit: Energy-dense snack with healthy fats and protein — ideal between meals on training days.
football_benefit_shona: Chidakadaka chakazara simba — chinoshanda pakati pekudya mazuva ekudzidzira.

name: Sugarcane
football_benefit: Quick sugar boost — chew a stick at half-time for a natural energy lift.
football_benefit_shona: Simba nekukurumidza — fura mutanda pakati pemutambo kuti uve nesimba.

name: Peanut Butter
football_benefit: Slow-burning energy with protein — spread on bread for a great pre-match meal.
football_benefit_shona: Simba richipera zvishoma neprotein — swedera pachingwa kuti uve nechikafu chakanaka usati watamba.

name: Kapenta (Small Dried Fish)
football_benefit: Very high protein at very low cost — excellent daily recovery food for budget players.
football_benefit_shona: Protein yakawanda uye yakachipa zvikuru — inoshanda mazuva ose kuvandudza mishipa kumaShamwari ane bhajeti.
